title: Obot Workshop: GitHub Auth, MCP, and Audit End-to-End
description: A complete Obot walkthrough: log in with the bootstrap token, set up GitHub authentication, add the GitHub MCP server to Claude, query your repositories, review the audit log, then install the Obot CLI, scan your inventory, and install a skill in Claude.

steps.title: Log In with the Bootstrap Token
Add the GitHub MCP Server to Claude
Install and Set Up the Obot CLI
